message:
refactor(wasm): extract memory and format modules

Phase 1 of wasm.zig refactoring for maintainability:

- Create src/wasm/ directory for modular organization
- Extract memory.zig (120 lines): bump allocator, alloc/free exports
- Extract format.zig (200 lines): binary helpers, footer parsing
- Update wasm.zig to import from new modules
- Add tests for new modules

WASM binary size: 183KB (unchanged)
